headline: Digital Utility Industry Report 2026-2035, Profiles of ABB, Accenture, Capgemini, Cisco, Cognizant, Eaton, GE, Honeywell, IBM, Itron, Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, Schneider Electric, Siemens, Toshiba
summary: The digital utility market is poised for growth through advancements in AI, IoT, and cloud technologies. Opportunities arise in sectors like smart grids, energy trading, and retail, with rising demand in services and IoT.
